summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Reports & Export features (Iteration 6). All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Bug fix for payment date affecting future landed entries verified.
passed_tests: API Health Check
Login Flow
Reports - Village Summary endpoint returns correct structure
Reports - Monthly Trend endpoint returns correct structure
Reports - Interest Rate Distribution endpoint returns correct structure
Reports - Top Borrowers endpoint returns sorted by pending amount
Export - All Accounts Excel (returns xlsx with correct headers)
Export - Individual Account Excel (returns xlsx with account details)
Export - Individual Account PDF (returns PDF with correct magic bytes)
Export - Non-existent account returns 404
Bug Fix - ACC000025 Entry 2 interest_start_date = 2026-03-10
Dashboard Summary endpoint
Dashboard Stats endpoint
Accounts List endpoint
Account Detail with enriched data
Reports endpoints require authentication
Export endpoints require authentication
Frontend - Reports page loads with 4 summary cards
Frontend - Monthly Lending vs Collection bar chart renders
Frontend - Village-wise Pending Amount pie chart renders
Frontend - Interest Rate Distribution chart renders
Frontend - Top Borrowers table shows data
Frontend - Village Summary table with totals footer
Frontend - Export All (Excel) button on Reports page
Frontend - Export button on Accounts List page
Frontend - Excel and PDF export buttons on Account Detail page
Frontend - Reports link in navigation sidebar

bug_fix_verification.scenario: Account ACC000025 with Landed Entry 1 (2026-03-01, ₹10,000) and Landed Entry 2 (2026-03-10, ₹2,000), Received Entry (2026-03-06, ₹2,000)
bug_fix_verification.expected_behavior: Entry 1 interest_start_date = 2026-03-06 (payment date), Entry 2 interest_start_date = 2026-03-10 (its own date)
bug_fix_verification.actual_behavior: Entry 1 interest_start_date = 06 Mar 2026 ✅, Entry 2 interest_start_date = 10 Mar 2026 ✅

export_features_verified.individual_account_excel: GET /api/export/accounts/{id}/excel - Returns xlsx with Overview, Jewellery, Landed, Received, Ledger sheets

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports & Export features fully tested and working. Reports page at /reports shows 4 summary cards, 3 charts (monthly trend bar, village pie, interest rate bar), top borrowers table, and village summary table with totals. Export endpoints: /api/export/accounts/excel (all accounts), /api/export/accounts/{id}/excel and /api/export/accounts/{id}/pdf (individual). All require auth. Bug fix for payment date verified - Account ACC000025 (id: 69b820918f6a1fd1231b5224) Entry 2 interest_start_date correctly shows its own date (2026-03-10) not the payment date.
